items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire With Iran
items.summary: The pause in hostilities had been set to expire within hours. The president said Pakistan, which is trying to mediate an end to the war, requested he hold off any attacks.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Trump announces extension of Iran ceasefire until ‘discussion concluded’
items.summary: Announcement comes amid intense efforts to bring two sides together in Pakistan for new round of talks Donald Trump unilaterally announced an extension of the two-week ceasefire...

items.title: Myanmar’s military government rebuffed on peace talks offer
items.summary: Min Aung Hlaing elected by parliament as president earlier this month after election derided as a sham.
